mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO tb_cart
count,
create_time,
last_edit_time, product_id, user_id
VALUES
#{count},
#{createTime},
#{lastEditTime}, #{productId}, #{userId}
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE cart_id = LAST_INSERT_ID(cart_id), count = #{count}, last_edit_time = #{lastEditTime}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM tb_cart WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND product_id = #{productId}
mapper.select: SELECT c.count, p.product_name, p.img_addr, p.normal_price, p.promotion_price, c.cart_id, c.product_id, s.shop_id, s.shop_name FROM tb_cart AS c LEFT JOIN tb_product AS p ON c.product_id = p.product_id LEFT JOIN tb_shop AS s ON p.shop_id = s.shop_id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId}
